runners.formComment: Won two starts back over 400m at Geelong. Last start he finished 4th in a Free For All on April 7 over 400m at Warragul behind Cash The Lot beaten 6 lengths (23.02). Draw likely to suit. Has run hot time here with a 21.84 PB at the distance. Key chance.

runners.formComment: Finished in the minors last time but the start prior was a strong winner after leading throughout, scoring by 1.75 lengths in a Grade 4/5 at Warrnambool. Top win two back and has claims here.

runners.formComment: Hit the frame last time at this track but the start prior was an eye-catching winner scoring by 0.9 lengths in a Free For All at Healesville and recording a powerful 16.60 over the 300m journey. Top win two back and has claims here.

runners.formComment: In sparkling form, last time showing brilliant early pace and proving too slick around Ballarat over 390m in 21.95, making it three wins on end. In hot form and can take this out.

runners.formComment: Resuming from a 11 weeks spell and worth noting was a fresh up winner last time in, scoring in 22.64 at big odds over 400m at Geelong. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on first turn, lost ground approaching home turn.
